summary: Frontend-only testing for IDSEA student membership additions. Verified: (1) Homepage 'Our Growing Community' section renders 5 category cards (Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International, Student) all aligned in a single row at same top offset. Student card uses pink/rose color (#ec4899) with GraduationCap icon and shows count 0. (2) /apply page shows 5 membership plan cards in a single row (Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International Delegates, Student). (3) Selecting Student plan reveals 'Student Details' section with Year of Study (1st-5th Year), Expected Graduation Year (2026-2033), Enrollment/Student ID input, and College ID Card upload (accept='image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp'). (4) Prefix dropdown correctly filters to only Mr./Ms./Mrs. when Student plan is selected; other plans show full list (Mr., Mrs., Ms., Dr., Prof., Shri, Smt). All requested behaviors verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: MembershipApplyPage.jsx has grown to 559 lines - consider splitting into subcomponents (PlanSelector, StudentFields, AddressFields) for maintainability.
Homepage growing community card uses composite count via cat.altKey - clean fallback in place for both 'students_membership' and 'student' keys, no issue found.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@idsea.org / Admin@123 (not used - frontend public flows only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview VPS plan uses key 'student' (not 'students_membership'). Homepage card renders Student count summing both keys via altKey mechanism. All 5 plan cards on /apply have data-testid='membership-type-<key>'. Student conditional fields have data-testid='student-fields-section', 'year-of-study', 'graduation-year', 'enrollment-number', 'college-id-upload'.
rca of the issue: No issue found; fix applied by main agent works as designed.
